calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Feb-09-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Lyn Bura, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Paul Raymond Perdue, Esq. for Plaintiff, L.M.D. Partners, and Stanley Ho, representative from L.M.D. Partners, present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Richard Clark, individually and dba Sports Net, and dba GNL Sports, and dba FTC Sports, and dba FTC Ski, Lloyd Uehara, individually and dba Sports Net, and dba GNL Sports, and dba FTC Sports, and dba FTC Ski as follows:
Back Rent $31,030.00
Per Diem Damages $9,360.00
Attorney's Fees $2,637.50
Costs $1,278.80,
for a total of $44,306.30, see scanned document for details.
Amended Judgment by Default signed in open court.
